title: Evals Are Broken, Use Them Anyway — Ara Khan, Cline
summary: Ara Khan argues that benchmark evals are imperfect but essential tools. Rather than treating benchmark numbers as definitive or relying on intuition, teams should systematically analyze failure traces to identify three categories: obvious bugs, model-specific nuances that affect performance on particular harnesses, and overfitting risks.
